Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0401 "BLACKLAMP-C800-0401" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $c800 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Black Lamp.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $C800 to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to start correctly. Note: the G64 of this game was used rather than the tape version, as that seems to have a bug which has an odd main character sprite corruption on the first go.
